word: G3763 - οὐδέποτε - oudépote - oo-dep'-ot-eh - Neither at any time

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Neither at any time
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
not even at any time, never, nothing at any time
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G3761 and G4218; not even at any time, that is, never at all: - neither at any time, never, nothing at any time.
